refnamediv.refpurpose: Return an initial camera calibration model.

refsection.title: Description
refsection.para: Builds a deterministic initial intrinsic matrix from the image dimensions and returns five zero distortion coefficients. When at least six non-degenerate 3-D to 2-D correspondences are supplied, the macro estimates a pose with imsolvepnp and reports the RMS reprojection error for this initial model. This macro is a calibration baseline for camera workflows; it does not yet optimize multiple views as OpenCV's full calibration routine does.

refsection.title: Examples
